name: observability-studio
description: Inspect OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, logs, and validation issues inside VS Code.

observability-studio.sharedObserverUrl.markdownDescription: Optional shared `obstudio` base URL or `/mcp` URL override. For cloud configuration, launch the shared Observer and VS Code with the same `OBSTUDIO_CONTROL_TOKEN`. When unset, the extension reuses or starts a managed local `obstudio` on `http://127.0.0.1:<managedObserverPort>`.

observability-studio.managedObserverPort.markdownDescription: Local port used by the extension-managed Observer UI and MCP HTTP endpoint when `sharedObserverUrl` is unset.

observability-studio.o11yOAuthIssuerUrl.markdownDescription: Trusted Splunk Observability Cloud OAuth issuer origin. Authorization, token, and revocation endpoints are derived from this one origin to prevent realm mix-up. For local SignalView testing, use `http://localhost:3000`.

observability-studio.o11yOAuthClientId.markdownDescription: Optional registered OAuth public client identifier. When unset, the extension uses `obstudio-vscode` in VS Code and `obstudio-cursor` in Cursor.

observability-studio.o11yOAuthScope.markdownDescription: OAuth scopes offered by Splunk Observability Studio. `ingest` is required for telemetry export; `api` is optional and enables dashboard and API automation when approved.

observability-studio.o11yOAuthRequiredSc.markdownDescription: Minimum granted OAuth scope required to reuse a stored Splunk Observability Cloud connection.

observability-studio.o11yOAuthTokenName.markdownDescription: Display name requested for the generated Splunk Observability Cloud access token.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node build-observer.js && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node build-observer.js && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile-tests && node --test --experimental-test-coverage out/test/extension.test.js out/test/webview-html.test.js out/test/observer-lifecycle.test.js out/test/build-vsix.test.js out/test/startup-errors.test.js
scripts.test:integration: tsc --outDir out --rootDir src --module Node16 --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop src/test/extension-integration.test.ts && node --test out/test/extension-integration.test.js
scripts.test:integration:smoke: tsc --outDir out --rootDir src --module Node16 --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop src/test/extension-integration.test.ts && node --test --test-name-pattern="installed VSIX smoke test" out/test/extension-integration.test.js
scripts.test:host: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && vscode-test --run out/test/extension-vscode.test.js --fail-zero --timeout 30000
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:host
